mapper.select:
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM routing r JOIN item i ON r.rout_item = i.item_id WHERE r.rout_usage = 'Y'
AND UPPER(i.item_name) LIKE UPPER('%' || #{searchKeyword} || '%')
AND UPPER(r.rout_name) LIKE UPPER('%' || #{searchKeyword} || '%')
AND ( UPPER(i.item_name) LIKE UPPER('%' || #{searchKeyword} || '%') OR UPPER(r.rout_name) LIKE UPPER('%' || #{searchKeyword} || '%') )

SELECT * FROM ( SELECT ROWNUM rnum, A.* FROM ( SELECT r.rout_id AS routId, r.rout_item AS routItem, r.rout_name AS routName, r.rout_content AS routContent, r.rout_usage AS routUsage, i.item_name AS itemName, i.item_type AS itemType FROM routing r JOIN item i ON r.rout_item = i.item_id WHERE r.rout_usage = 'Y'
AND UPPER(i.item_name) LIKE UPPER('%' || #{routDTO.searchKeyword} || '%')
AND UPPER(r.rout_name) LIKE UPPER('%' || #{routDTO.searchKeyword} || '%')
AND ( UPPER(i.item_name) LIKE UPPER('%' || #{routDTO.searchKeyword} || '%') OR UPPER(r.rout_name) LIKE UPPER('%' || #{routDTO.searchKeyword} || '%') )
ORDER BY r.rout_id DESC ) A WHERE ROWNUM <= #{page.currentPage} * #{page.boardLimit} ) WHERE rnum > (#{page.currentPage} - 1) * #{page.boardLimit}
SELECT item_id AS itemId, item_name AS itemName, item_type AS itemType FROM item WHERE item_usage = 'Y' AND item_type IN (20, 30) ORDER BY item_id
SELECT wp_type_no AS wpTypeNo, wp_type_name AS wpTypeName, wp_type_content AS wpTypeContent FROM wp_type ORDER BY wp_type_no
mapper.insert:
SELECT 'PROC' || PROC_SEQ.NEXTVAL FROM dual
INSERT INTO process ( proc_id, proc_name, proc_content, proc_usage, proc_wp_type ) VALUES ( #{procId}, #{procName}, #{procContent}, 'Y', #{procWpType} )

SELECT 'RT' || ROUT_SEQ.NEXTVAL FROM dual
INSERT INTO routing ( rout_id, rout_item, rout_name, rout_content, rout_usage ) VALUES ( #{routId}, #{routItem}, #{routName}, #{routContent}, 'Y' )
INSERT INTO routing_detail ( rout_dtl_id, rout_dtl_rout, rout_dtl_step, rout_dtl_proc, rout_dtl_usage ) VALUES ( 'RDTL' || RDTL_SEQ.NEXTVAL, #{routDtlRout}, #{routDtlStep}, #{routDtlProc}, 'Y' )
mapper.select: SELECT r.rout_id AS routId, r.rout_item AS routItem, r.rout_name AS routName, r.rout_content AS routContent, r.rout_usage AS routUsage, i.item_name AS itemName, i.item_type AS itemType FROM routing r JOIN item i ON r.rout_item = i.item_id WHERE r.rout_id = #{routId} AND r.rout_usage = 'Y'

SELECT rd.rout_dtl_id AS routDtlId, rd.rout_dtl_rout AS routDtlRout, rd.rout_dtl_step AS routDtlStep, rd.rout_dtl_proc AS routDtlProc, rd.rout_dtl_usage AS routDtlUsage,
p.proc_id AS procId, p.proc_name AS procName, p.proc_content AS procContent, p.proc_usage AS procUsage, p.proc_wp_type AS procWpType,
wt.wp_type_no AS wpTypeNo, wt.wp_type_name AS wpTypeName, wt.wp_type_content AS wpTypeContent,
NVL(eq_sum.eq_count, 0) AS eqCount, eq_sum.first_eq_name AS firstEqName
FROM routing_detail rd JOIN process p ON rd.rout_dtl_proc = p.proc_id
LEFT JOIN wp_type wt ON p.proc_wp_type = wt.wp_type_no
LEFT JOIN ( SELECT wp.wp_type AS wp_type_no, COUNT(eq.eq_id) AS eq_count, MIN(eq.eq_name) AS first_eq_name FROM workplace wp LEFT JOIN equipment eq ON eq.eq_wpid = wp.wp_id AND eq.eq_usage = 'Y' WHERE wp.wp_usage = 'Y' GROUP BY wp.wp_type ) eq_sum ON eq_sum.wp_type_no = p.proc_wp_type
WHERE rd.rout_dtl_rout = #{routId} AND rd.rout_dtl_usage = 'Y' AND p.proc_usage = 'Y'
ORDER BY rd.rout_dtl_step

SELECT r.ROUT_ID AS routId, r.ROUT_NAME AS routName,
p.PROC_ID AS procId, p.PROC_NAME AS procName, p.PROC_CONTENT AS procContent,
p.PROC_WP_TYPE AS wpTypeNo,
CASE p.PROC_WP_TYPE WHEN 10 THEN '전처리 작업장' WHEN 20 THEN '배합 작업장' WHEN 30 THEN '반죽 작업장' WHEN 40 THEN '제피 작업장' WHEN 50 THEN '성형 작업장' WHEN 60 THEN '증숙 작업장' WHEN 70 THEN '냉각 작업장' WHEN 80 THEN '급속냉동 작업장' WHEN 90 THEN '포장 작업장' WHEN 100 THEN '검사 작업장' ELSE '-' END AS wpTypeName,
'-' AS eqTypeName
FROM ROUTING_DETAIL rd JOIN ROUTING r ON rd.ROUT_DTL_ROUT = r.ROUT_ID
JOIN PROCESS p ON rd.ROUT_DTL_PROC = p.PROC_ID
WHERE rd.ROUT_DTL_ROUT = #{routId} AND rd.ROUT_DTL_PROC = #{procId} AND rd.ROUT_DTL_USAGE = 'Y' AND r.ROUT_USAGE = 'Y' AND p.PROC_USAGE = 'Y'

SELECT wp.WP_ID AS id, wp.WP_NAME AS name
FROM ROUTING_DETAIL rd JOIN PROCESS p ON rd.ROUT_DTL_PROC = p.PROC_ID
JOIN WORKPLACE wp ON p.PROC_WP_TYPE = wp.WP_TYPE
WHERE rd.ROUT_DTL_ROUT = #{routId} AND rd.ROUT_DTL_PROC = #{procId} AND rd.ROUT_DTL_USAGE = 'Y' AND p.PROC_USAGE = 'Y' AND wp.WP_USAGE = 'Y'
ORDER BY wp.WP_ID

SELECT eq.EQ_ID AS id, eq.EQ_NAME AS name
FROM ROUTING_DETAIL rd JOIN PROCESS p ON rd.ROUT_DTL_PROC = p.PROC_ID
JOIN WORKPLACE wp ON p.PROC_WP_TYPE = wp.WP_TYPE
JOIN EQUIPMENT eq ON wp.WP_ID = eq.EQ_WPID
WHERE rd.ROUT_DTL_ROUT = #{routId} AND rd.ROUT_DTL_PROC = #{procId} AND rd.ROUT_DTL_USAGE = 'Y' AND p.PROC_USAGE = 'Y' AND wp.WP_USAGE = 'Y' AND eq.EQ_USAGE = 'Y'
ORDER BY eq.EQ_ID
